title: "New Jersey Kids Code Act", adopts Age-Appropriate Design Code for New Jersey and requires certain online services to implement certain measures concerning minors' use of online service.
summary: "New Jersey Kids Code Act", adopts Age-Appropriate Design Code for New Jersey and requires certain online services to implement certain measures concerning minors' use of online service.
